name: Consumed
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Viscous Grip
granted_abilities.text: When this model activates, it must pass a TN 14 Sp duel or gain a Slow token.

granted_abilities.name: "GetItOffGetItOffGetItOff!"
granted_abilities.text: Another friendly model may target this model with the Interact action to remove this upgrade.

extraction_notes: The limitations section shows a single dash '-', indicating no specific limitations beyond those implied by the upgrade type.
This upgrade appears to be a negative/debuff effect that can be applied to models during play.
The upgrade grants two abilities with negative effects that hinder the model but can be removed by allies.
